title: Plan bounded R3-005 request-to-task conversion
summary: Convert one planning-ready Request Brief into one bounded Task Packet with durable lineage.

lineage.rationale: The operator opened R3-005 as a bounded supervised planning step.

work_object_refs.notes: The planning flow must target the accepted governed task surface from the R3-003 baseline.

planning_record_refs.notes: The Task Packet must derive from the accepted planning baseline.

evidence.summary: The milestone brief authorizes bounded Request Brief to Task Packet flow work in R3-005.

audit.notes: Request Brief flow fixture reviewed against the focused R3-005 flow test.

request_intent: Plan the bounded R3-005 Request Brief to Task Packet conversion.
requested_outcome: Produce one approved Task Packet that stays inside the accepted planning baseline and preserves durable linkage to the source Request Brief.
operator_questions: Which accepted planning baseline should anchor the packet?
What bounded scope must remain explicit in the packet output?
